topIssues: Frame 4: This frame is virtually identical to Frame 3, representing 'dead air' where the agent is just 'thinking' without any new visual progress or log updates.
Frame 3-10: The 'Room trace' log in the bottom-right corner has extremely low contrast (dark gray text on a near-black background), making the step-by-step execution details very difficult to read.
Frame 1-10: Technical row identifiers (e.g., 'r_rev', 'r_cogs') are very small and low-contrast compared to the main account names.
fixSuggestions: Consolidate Frame 3 and Frame 4 into a single frame or introduce a distinct visual change (like an active loading spinner state) to keep the pacing tight.
Increase the font contrast/brightness for the 'Room trace' log text to improve readability of the background agent actions.
Slightly increase the font size or contrast of the row keys on the far left of the spreadsheet to match the high polish of the rest of the table.
